posts.author: nvr (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml:
In my dashboard all items are created in one board, which is fine. But the need is to duplicate the new created items in a new created board, So that each created item also gets its own board.

For example, as the automation shows, when an item is created, it is possible to create a new board and duplicate the item. Furthermore, there is the ability to move/duplicate items to another board.

But in this the only missing thing, is that the items could only be moved to an existing board. The need is that the duplication of the new created item could be moved to the new created board in the same automation.

image1084×373 21 KB

Am I overlooking something, or is this a limitation within Monday?

Thanks for the consideration
